nodes.name: 判断所有必填项是否已填

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT (*) FROM public.defective_records dr JOIN public.activation_records ar ON dr.active_id = ar.id WHERE to_timestamp(ar.activatetime::bigint) >= '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][0] }}'::timestamp AND to_timestamp(ar.activatetime::bigint) <= '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][1] }}'::timestamp + interval '1 day' - interval '1 second' AND ar.firmware_type = '{{$json.firmware_type}}'

nodes.name: 查询各地区各时段的不良设备数量
构建不良数据查询语句

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT (*) FROM public.activation_records WHERE to_timestamp(activatetime::bigint) >= '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][0] }}'::timestamp AND to_timestamp(activatetime::bigint) <=  '{{ $json.timeIntervals[0][1] }}'::timestamp + interval '1 day' - interval '1 second'  AND firmware_type = '{{ $json.firmware_type }}' ;
